title: Osaka Totem (Azumanga Daioh)
description: Now you can use Osaka as your own totem
body:
🎓 Osaka Totem Resourcepack  
Carry charm and wit—replace your Totem of Undying with Osaka herself!  
Inspired by Ayumu "Osaka" Kasuga from *Azumanga Daioh*, this resourcepack adds a playful twist to survival gameplay.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom Osaka-themed model    
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+ (OptiFine or custom model loader recommended)
